data.title: P&G declares quarterly dividend of $1.0568 per share for January 2026, payable on Feb 17 to shareholders of record by Jan 23.
data.description: In Cincinnati, the Board of Directors of The Procter & Gamble Company declared a quarterly dividend of $1.0568 per share on the Common Stock, Series A, and Series B ESOP Convertible Class A Preferred Stock. The dividend will be payable on or after February 17, 2026. Common Stock shareowners must be recorded by January 23, 2026, and Series A and Series B ESOP Convertible Class A Preferred Stock shareowners by the start of business on that day. This news reflects the company's commitment to providing returns to its shareholders.

data.title: Thales Academy is expanding to open a new junior high/high school in Raleigh, NC, its tenth location in the Triangle.
data.description: In Raleigh, N.C., on January 13, 2026, Thales Academy, a chain of cost-effective K-12 classical schools spanning North Carolina, Tennessee, and Virginia, is broadening its reach. The organization is introducing a fresh junior high/high school facility in northeast Raleigh, North Carolina, marking its tenth presence in the Triangle region.

data.title: Impinj reports preliminary Q4 2025 revenue and adjusted EBITDA figures before Needham Growth Conference.
data.description: Seattle-based technology company Impinj has revealed its preliminary financial results for the fourth quarter of 2025. The company announced that its revenue for the quarter exceeded expectations, reaching approximately [insert number] million. Additionally, Impinj reported that its adjusted EBITDA for the same period also outperformed forecasts. The positive results were shared just before the company's participation in the 28th Annual Needham Growth Conference.

data.title: Mastercard (NYSE: MA) will share Q4 and full year 2025 financial results on January 29, 2026 in a conference call.
data.description: Global payment company Mastercard, traded under the symbol MA on the New York Stock Exchange, is set to announce its financial performance for the fourth quarter and full year of 2025 on January 29, 2026.

data.title: Buffett's successor Abel will earn $25 million base salary, 250 times more than Buffett's $100,000. Berkshire Hathaway's new era begins.
data.description: Warren Buffett concluded his long tenure as CEO of Berkshire Hathaway Inc (NYSE: BRK ) (NYSE: BRK ) by the end of 2025. A major change is coming for the conglomerate in 2026, particularly regarding the CEO's salary. Greg Abel, the new CEO succeeding Buffett after holding leadership positions in Berkshire's energy and non-insurance sectors, faces the challenge of living up to the reputation of the renowned investor known as the "Oracle of Omaha." Shareholders anticipate sustained success from the investing powerhouse under Abel's leadership. In his new position, Abel will be compensated significantly more than Buffett was during his tenure as CEO. Berkshire Hathaway disclosed in a recent filing that Abel's base salary will be $25 million, a notable increase from Buffett's previous base salary of $100,000. This translates to Abel making 250 times more than Buffett did in his role.

data.title: NVIDIA's cuOpt Solver solves 4 optimization problems, beats CPU solvers with 22% lower gaps. Read on for the results!
data.description: NVIDIA's recently developed GPU-accelerated cuOpt engine has made significant strides in solving four challenging benchmark problems from the MIPLIB set. The engine has shown remarkable performance by outperforming traditional CPU solvers, boasting a 22% reduction in objective gaps. This breakthrough highlights the potential of GPU technology in optimizing complex problem-solving tasks, offering a promising avenue for advancements in computational efficiency.

data.title: Limbach appoints Nick Angerosa EVP, National Customer Solutions, and Jay Sharp EVP, Sales in national growth strategy.
data.description: Limbach Holdings, Inc., a company listed on the NASDAQ under the ticker symbol LMB, based in Warrendale, Pennsylvania, recently made key executive appointments. Nick Angerosa was named the Executive Vice President for National Customer Solutions, while Jay Sharp was appointed as the Executive Vice President for Sales. These appointments are set to be effective starting January 13, 2026. Limbach focuses on offering building system solutions to partners, particularly building owners and facility managers, who require critical mechanical, electrical, and plumbing infrastructure services.

data.title: Agree Realty (NYSE: ADC) declares $0.262 monthly dividend per share, 3.6% increase from last year, payable on February 13, 2026.
data.description: In Royal Oak, Michigan, Agree Realty Corporation (NYSE: ADC) declared a monthly cash dividend of $0.262 per common share. This brings the annualized dividend amount to $3.144 per common share, marking a 3.6% rise from the prior amount of $3.036 per common share in the first quarter of 2025. The dividend will be paid out on February 13, 2026 to stockholders.

data.title: Angel Oak Mortgage REIT, Inc. (NYSE: AOMR) announces 2025 dividend info: $1.28 per share (CUSIP 03464Y108) distributed.
data.description: In Atlanta, Angel Oak Mortgage REIT, Inc. (NYSE: AOMR) disclosed tax details on its dividend distributions for 2025. Throughout the year, the company dispersed dividends amounting to $1.28 per share of common stock (CUSIP 03464Y108). Angel Oak Mortgage REIT, Inc. specializes in acquiring and investing in first lien non-QM loans and other mortgage-related assets within the U.S. mortgage market.

data.title: Phoenix Education Partners reported $262.0 million revenue in three months; focused on career-relevant education.
data.description: In Phoenix, Phoenix Education Partners, Inc. (NYSE: PXED) announced financial results for the quarter ending November 30, 2025. The parent company of The University of Phoenix, Inc. reported first-quarter revenue of $262.0 million. Chris Lynne, Chief Executive Officer, emphasized their commitment to providing career-relevant education for working adults, driving progress within the University.

data.title: NYC Mayor Mamdani confirms no crypto holdings, rejects Adams' memecoin investment.
data.description: Zohran Mamdani rejected the idea of holding any cryptocurrency or investing in a memecoin project associated with a former New York City mayor. This decision came within two weeks of assuming office.

data.title: New website TheMyakkaInitiative.com provides transparency on land stewardship in Myakka River Basin, launched on Jan. 13, 2026.
data.description: A website named TheMyakkaInitiative.com was recently launched in Myakka City, Florida on January 13, 2026. This website aims to be a reliable source of information for residents, elected officials, regulatory agencies, community leaders, and media. By providing clear and factual information, it serves as a valuable resource for those interested in the community.

data.title: Enova to reveal Q4 & FY 2025 financials post-market close. Machine learning-driven financial services company (NYSE: ENVA).
data.description: Enova International (NYSE: ENVA), a prominent financial services company leveraging machine learning and advanced analytics, revealed that its financial results for the fourth quarter and full year of 2025 will be made public after the market concludes on January 13, 2026, in Chicago. The company is set to disclose key numbers and performance indicators during this period, reflecting its operations and success in the previous year.

data.title: Best Buy (NYSE: BBY) benefits from AI integration in consumer electronics, sees positive results with a strong outlook for fiscal 2026.
data.description: Best Buy (NYSE: BBY) is benefiting from the integration of artificial intelligence into its products, with AI now being embedded in the latest laptops and mobile devices. The retailer posted strong results in the second and third quarters, attributing its success to the replacement cycle as consumers upgrade to the latest technology. Best Buy has raised its fiscal 2026 guidance due to growth across key product lines. The company's focus on product education and evangelism allows it to monetize the latest innovations. The shift towards AI in consumer products highlights the retailer's relevance in an increasingly digital world. Despite not receiving as much attention as semiconductor companies, Best Buy's stock could be a beneficiary of the evolving tech landscape.

data.title: John Hancock Closed-End Funds release earnings data for 3 months ending 12/31/25: HEQ - $1.48M, NAV $12.20M; BTO - $2.87M, NAV $36.04M.
data.description: In Boston, on January 13, 2026, the John Hancock Closed-End Funds provided their quarterly earnings report for the three months concluding on December 31, 2025. The data for the corresponding period in 2024 is also outlined below. For the quarter ending on 12/31/25, the Hedged Equity & Income Fund (HEQ) disclosed net investment income per common share amounting to $1,479,416, with a value of $0.123 per share, while the Net Asset Value (NAV) stood at $12.20. The total managed assets and net assets were noted to be $147,093,835 for this fund. In the same period, the Financial Opportunities Fund (BTO) generated $2,870,553 in net investment income, equating to $0.145 per share, showing a NAV of $36.04. The total managed assets reported were $844,255,276, with the total net assets amounting to $714,255,276. For further details, the full coverage is accessible on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Atlassian (NASDAQ: TEAM) will release Q2 fiscal 2026 results on Feb 5, 2026, discussing them at a conference call at 2:00 P.M. PT.
data.description: Software company Atlassian Corporation (NASDAQ: TEAM) revealed it will unveil its financial report for the second quarter of fiscal year 2026, which concluded on December 31, 2025, post-market closure on Thursday, February 5, 2026. The company is set to conduct a conference call to delve into these results at 2:00 P.M. Pacific Time. Apart from the earnings press release, Atlassian will also share a document.
